noticeJa: 非本番の設計資料。runtimeから参照しない。正式データではない。正式キャラクターIDを発行していない。正式画像パスを使用していない。

stages.name: creative direction
deliverables: shape principles shared by all three characters
shape principles that vary among the three
one-sentence core and reason to like each character
silhouette, face, and color memory points
reasons for any motif replacement proposal
stages.userDecision: approve creative direction and separately approve any motif replacement

stages.name: black silhouettes
requirements: independent character concepts, not pose variants
no internal detail, eyes, expression, color, texture, shading, equipment, text, or background
different ratio, center of mass, contour, posture, species parts, and block organization
deliverables: one-sentence reason to like per option
short explanation of structural difference per option
stages.userDecision: select up to two options per motif or use agreed reproposal/stop terms

stages.name: color-plane design
requirements: primarily three or four large colors or regions
avoid signature existing-IP palette or marking resemblance
normal remains appealing without rare or legendary ornament

stages.name: model sheet
deliverables: front, side, rear, and three-quarter views
stages.userDecision: character or art lead accepts reproducible construction

stages.name: finished key art
requirements: no background, ground, or foot shadow
vector or higher-resolution source when contracted
stages.userDecision: separate art approval and technical QA

stages.name: cross-character art bible
deliverables: head-to-body, face, eye, mouth, ear, limb, line, shading, color, texture, pose, and expression rules
reference material for future human and separately approved AI-assisted work
stages.userDecision: user and IP or art leads approve the three-character system
